item.name: War Tiger Horn
item.description: This curved horn emits a roaring tone that summons your war tiger.

mount.name: War Tiger
mount.action: Summon forth your war tiger to tear the enemy's morale to shreds with its cruel, curved fangs.
mount.description: Even among tigers, the sabertooth is said to be notoriously difficult to tame, but those creatures raised from birth may come to bear riders upon their backs and into war.
